title: 12092 page header claiming seven running days
rejection_reason: The page header says all days while its detailed service-days field and independent Ixigo detail say Tue/Wed/Fri/Sat/Sun. Header is not used as a claim source.

title: Generic KGM-HW page all-days icon
rejection_reason: Generic icon conflicts with the train-detail service-day field; not used for 12092 operating days.

title: Exact future December 2026 fares and availability
rejection_reason: No current source can establish final December 2026 inventory, fares, platform changes or disruptions. All current amounts remain snapshots and require live recheck.
